AUTHOR'S NOTES!

"The bot keeps talking as my character!"

It's not my fault, I've codded him to only speak for himself and you should probably play with the temperature a bit, write [Do not speak as {{user}}] at the end of ur text, regenerate the message or just delete the part you want.

"It is being over sexual!"

Play with the temperature, as i said before, it is not under my control and i advise you to do the same thing i said beforehand.

Public chats and policy

If your roleplay somehow involves , , torture and gore, or any gruesome themes, if you plan on letting the chat be public, please put a TW on it.

This is my first time posting here so i hope y'all like it! Reqs form link is in my bio <3
